passives.desc: This unit's SP value cannot affect the outcome of Coin flips, which is fixed to 50-50 On Clash Win against Sinners, lose 5 SP and deal -40% damage against them When in Low Morale or Panic states, gain [ParryingResultDown] and [ResultReduction] When recovering from Panic, gain 2 [ResultReduction]
passives.name: The Unwrapped Present

passives.desc: Turn Start: Gain 50 [DefenseBug] (Gain 3 fewer [DefenseBug] with every subsequent turn; max reduction 20) - If this unit has [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], or [Sinking], reduce their Potency by a random value; then, lose the same Stacks of [DefenseBug] as that random value - If the above effects are at 1 Potency but has 2+ Count, reduce their Count instead If all [DefenseBug] was lost during the combat phase, gain the following effects next turn: - Gain 10 [DefenseDown] instead of gaining [DefenseBug] - Generate 2 E.G.O resources for each of the 3 least-owned Affinities - Turn End: Remove all negative effects from this unit and start gaining [DefenseBug] again
passives.name: The Emperor's Subjects

passives.desc:
- On Clash Win, inflict 3 [OffenseBug] on target
- On Hit with a Skill, inflict 1 [OffenseBug] on target
passives.name: The Emperor's Legion

passives.desc:
Take -50% HP, SP damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Burst], and [Sinking]; -50% to Stagger Threshold raised by [Vibration]
Cannot be Staggered due to this damage
Turn Start: Gain 2 [ResultReduction] for every 25% missing HP on the Core
passives.name: The Emperor's Blood

passives.desc:
At 50% HP, or when Staggered, recover from Stagger and remove all negative effects on this unit and gain a new pattern
Then, gain the following effects:
- Reset SP to 0
- Gain 50 [DefenseBug]
- Double the amount of [OffenseBug] inflicted by the Passive "The Emperor's Legion"
passives.name: The Emperor's Wrath

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery
